title: Jungle Menace
writer: George M. Merrick, Sherman L. Lowe, Harry O. Hoyt
actors: Frank Buck, Sasha Siemel, Reginald Denny
plot: In the Asian province of Seemang where the Bay of Bengal meets the jungle, Chandler Elliott (John St. Polis) owns a large and prosperous rubber plantation. His attractive daughter, Dorothy (Charlotte Henry), is engaged to neighbor...
